title: M.O.P.Vaishnav College Important Dates 2026

detail.title: M.O.P.Vaishnav College Important Dates 2026
detail.short_info: M.O.P. Vaishnav College for Women Application Form 2026 is open for UG, PG & MBA admissions 2026-27. Apply online now at the official portal for M.O.P. Vaishnav College for Women, Chennai. Check eligibility and important dates.

content.text: M.O.P. Vaishnav College for Women Application Form 2026 is now open for UG, PG, and MBA admissions at M.O.P. Vaishnav College for Women (Autonomous), Chennai. Eligible women candidates can apply online through the official admission portal for the academic year 2026-27.

M.O.P. Vaishnav College for Women (Autonomous), Chennai (commonly known as M.O.P.Vaishnav College), is a reputed autonomous institution affiliated to the University of Madras. The college offers a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in Commerce, Management, Computer Science, Media, Psychology, and other streams. Admissions for 2026-27 are conducted entirely through an online process on a merit basis for most programmes.

sections.heading: M.O.P.Vaishnav College for Women Application Form 2026 Overview

content.text: Apply Online Link: M.O.P.Vaishnav College Admission Portal

rows: UG Programmes (B.A., B.Sc., B.Com., BBA, BCA)
Graduation in any stream + Valid TANCET / MAT Score

content.text: Application fee is approximately ₹500 (varies by programme). Payment is made online through the admission portal.

sections.heading: How to Apply for M.O.P.Vaishnav College Application Form 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official admission portal: mopvaishnav.co.in/admission
Complete registration using a valid email ID and mobile number (OTP-based verification).
Login using registered email and Date of Birth as password.
Fill in personal, academic, and qualification details accurately.
Select desired programme(s).
Upload scanned copies of required documents.
Pay the application fee online.
Submit the form and download/print the confirmation page.

content.text: Admissions are primarily based on merit (marks in qualifying examination). Some programmes (especially in Media, Visual Communication, and MBA) may include additional rounds such as interviews or portfolio evaluation. Sports quota admissions are also available.

sections.heading: Documents Required for M.O.P.Vaishnav College Admission 2026

items: 10th and 12th Mark Sheets & Certificates
Graduation Mark Sheets (for PG applicants)
Transfer Certificate & Conduct Certificate
Community Certificate (if applicable)
Passport-size photographs
Aadhaar Card or other ID proof
Any other documents specified during online application

sections.heading: List of Programmes Offered at M.O.P.Vaishnav College

content.text: UG Programmes: BBA, B.Com (General, Accounting & Finance, Corporate Secretaryship, Honours, etc.), B.Sc. (Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Mathematics, Visual Communication, Electronic Media, Psychology, Food Science & Management), B.A. (Journalism, Sociology, Economics) and more.
PG Programmes: MBA, M.A. (HRM, Communication, Public Policy), M.Sc. (IT, Food Technology & Management, Applied Psychology), M.Com. etc.
Explore Full Programme List: Click Here
